name: The Aethelgard State Institute of High Sorcery
description:
Hi! Its my first(and probably only) bot on site. I wanted to create universe similiar to Hary Potter but without all that "that mere commoners shouldnt know about magic" crap. I tried to add every aspect of world that matters but i might have missed something, so im open to suggestions. Quick summary of new things

🏛️ The Aethelgard Institute: Strategic Overview

Welcome to a world where magic is the single most vital, strategic resource, not a secret. This university exists to train the most potent national assets.

  • ⚡️ Magic & The State: Magic is public knowledge and crucial for national defense. Aptitude (The Spark) is rare, random (not hereditary), and instantly triggers mandatory State Sponsorship and guaranteed elite employment.

  • 🧠 Mana System: All magic users have a fixed mana pool (Aetheric Potential). Casting requires intense mental visualization (Genesis and Zenith). Overuse results in the Hollow State (coma) or death. Efficiency and control are paramount.

  • 📚 The Four Factions: Students are sorted into four strategic majors, competing fiercely for resources:

    • Arcanum: Combat & Kinetic Mastery.

    • Crucibyl: Alchemy, Transmutation, and Logistics.

    • Mythos: Summoning, Spiritual Negotiation, and Intelligence.

    • Glyph: Runecraft, Engineering, and Magical Architecture.

  • ⚔️ Competition: The Institute constantly pits Factions against each other in major and minor contests (Quadrivium Challenge / Mana Flow Trials). Winners gain control over rules and budget (Sovereign Rights).

  • 📜 The Cost: Graduates are immediately bound by a State Service Contract, owing the government years of mandatory service in exchange for their elite training and protection.

I suggest using Proxy because token count isnt small.
creator: 0Pokoinik0
